---
title: "2. Descriptive Analysis"
subtitle: "MY498: Capstone Project 2025-26"
author: "68508"
date: today
format:
    html:
        embed-resources: true
        toc: true
        number-sections: true
        fontsize: 12pt
---
```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false

library(tidyverse)
library(zoo)
library(sf)
library(here)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggthemes)

Proc <- here("data", "processed")
raw  <- here("data", "raw")

# Load analysis panel and spatial data
analysis_panel <- readRDS(file.path(Proc, "analysis_panel.rds"))
study_sf       <- readRDS(file.path(Proc, "study_sf.rds"))

message("Panel loaded: ", nrow(analysis_panel), " rows | ",
        n_distinct(analysis_panel$ons_code), " study units")
```

```{r}
#| label: summary-stats
#| message: false

# Summary statistics by group 
summary_stats <- analysis_panel |>
    st_drop_geometry() |>
    filter(yq == as.yearqtr("2022 Q3")) |> # pre-announcement snapshot
    mutate(
        group = case_when(
            london == 1 & treated == 0 ~ "Inner London (Control)",
            london == 1 & treated == 1 ~ "Outer London (Treated)",
            london == 0 ~ "Surrounding Districts"
        )
    ) |>
    group_by(group) |>
    summarise(
        n = n(),
        mean_ulev_share = mean(ulev_share, na.rm = TRUE),
        mean_cars_total = mean(cars_total, na.rm = TRUE),
        mean_pct_no_car = mean(pct_no_car, na.rm=TRUE),
        mean_deprivation = mean(deprivation_index, na.rm = TRUE),
        mean_pop_density = mean(pop_density_per_km2, na.rm = TRUE),
        mean_house_price = mean(house_price, na.rm = TRUE),
        mean_earnings = mean(median_earnings_gbp, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
    )
summary_stats |>
    kable(
        digits  = 3,
        caption = "Summary Statistics by Group — Pre-Announcement (2022 Q3)",
        col.names = c("Group", "N", "ULEV Share", "Total Cars",
                      "% No Car", "Deprivation Index", "Pop Density /km²",
                      "Avg House Price", "Median Earnings")
    ) |>
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"))
```

```{r}
#| label: raw-trends
#| message: false

# Aggregate to group means by quarter
trends_data <- analysis_panel |>
    st_drop_geometry() |>
    mutate(
        group = case_when(
            london == 1 & treated == 0 ~ "Inner London (Control)",
            london == 1 & treated == 1 ~ "Outer London (Treated)",
            london == 0                ~ "Surrounding Districts (Never-Treated)"
        )
    ) |>
    group_by(yq, group) |>
    summarise(
        mean_ulev_share = mean(ulev_share, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
    )

ggplot(trends_data, aes(x = yq, y = mean_ulev_share, colour = group)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = as.numeric(as.yearqtr("2022 Q4")),
               linetype = "dashed", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = as.numeric(as.yearqtr("2023 Q3")),
               linetype = "dashed", colour = "red", linewidth = 0.6) +
    annotate("text", x = as.numeric(as.yearqtr("2022 Q4")),
             y = Inf, vjust = 1.5, hjust = -0.1,
             label = "Announcement", size = 3, colour = "black") +
    annotate("text", x = as.numeric(as.yearqtr("2023 Q3")),
             y = Inf, vjust = 1.5, hjust = -0.1,
             label = "Implementation", size = 3, colour = "red") +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c(
        "Inner London (Control)"               = "steelblue",
        "Outer London (Treated)"               = "firebrick",
        "Surrounding Districts (Never-Treated)" = "darkgreen"
    )) +
    labs(
        title    = "ULEV Compliance Share by Group",
        subtitle = "Mean across study units by quarter",
        x        = "Quarter",
        y        = "ULEV share (ULEVs / total cars)",
        colour   = NULL,
        caption  = "Black dashed = announcement (2022 Q4). Red dashed = implementation (2023 Q3)."
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r}
#| label: study-area-map
#| message: false

study_sf <- study_sf |>
    mutate(london = as.integer(str_starts(ons_code, "E09")))

# Load ULEZ boundaries for the map
ulez_2021 <- st_read(
    file.path(raw, "ulez_2021/InnerUltraLowEmissionZone.shp"),
    quiet = TRUE
) |>
    st_set_crs(27700)

ulez_2023 <- st_read(
    file.path(raw, "ulez_2023/londonWideUltraLowEmissionZone.shp"),
    quiet = TRUE
) |>
    st_set_crs(27700)

# Map
ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = study_sf |> filter(london == 0),
            fill = "lightyellow", colour = "orange",
            linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_sf(data = study_sf |> filter(london == 1, treated == 1),
            fill = "#f4a582", colour = "grey50",
            linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_sf(data = study_sf |> filter(london == 1, treated == 0),
            fill = "#92c5de", colour = "grey50",
            linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_sf(data = ulez_2021, fill = NA, colour = "darkblue",
            linewidth = 0.7, linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_sf(data = ulez_2023, fill = NA, colour = "darkred",
            linewidth = 0.7, linetype = "dashed") +
    labs(
        title    = "Study Area and Treatment Assignment",
        subtitle = "Blue = Inner London (control)\nRed = Outer London (treated)\nYellow = Surrounding districts (never-treated)",
        caption  = "Blue dashed = 2021 ULEZ boundary (N/S Circular)\nRed dashed = 2023 ULEZ boundary (Greater London)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
        axis.text  = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank()
    )
```

```{r}
#| label: balance-table
#| message: false

balance <- analysis_panel |>
    st_drop_geometry() |>
    filter(yq == as.yearqtr("2022 Q3")) |>
    mutate(
        group = case_when(
            london == 1 & treated == 0 ~ "Inner London\n(Control)",
            london == 1 & treated == 1 ~ "Outer London\n(Treated)",
            london == 0                ~ "Surrounding\nDistricts"
        )
    ) |>
    group_by(group) |>
    summarise(
        `N units`                    = n(),
        `ULEV share (%)`             = round(mean(ulev_share, na.rm=TRUE) * 100, 2),
        `BEV share (%)`              = round(mean(bev_share, na.rm=TRUE) * 100, 2),
        `PHEV share (%)`             = round(mean(phev_share, na.rm=TRUE) * 100, 2),
        `Company share (%)`          = round(mean(company_share, na.rm=TRUE) * 100, 2),
        `Private share (%)`          = round(mean(private_share, na.rm=TRUE) * 100, 2),
        `Total cars`                 = round(mean(cars_total, na.rm=TRUE)),
        `% No car`                   = round(mean(pct_no_car, na.rm=TRUE) * 100, 1),
        `Avg cars per HH`            = round(mean(avg_cars_hh, na.rm=TRUE), 2),
        `Deprivation index`          = round(mean(deprivation_index, na.rm=TRUE), 3),
        `Pop density (per km²)`      = round(mean(pop_density_per_km2, na.rm=TRUE)),
        `Avg house price (£)`        = round(mean(house_price, na.rm=TRUE)),
        `Median earnings (£)`        = round(mean(median_earnings_gbp, na.rm=TRUE)),
        .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    t() |>
    as.data.frame()

# Fix column names
colnames(balance) <- balance[1, ]
balance <- balance[-1, ]

balance |>
    kable(
        caption = "Balance Table — Pre-Announcement Characteristics (2022 Q3)"
    ) |>
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) |>
    row_spec(1:2, bold = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#| label: disaggregated-trends
#| message: false

# Aggregate disaggregated shares by group and quarter
disagg_data <- analysis_panel |>
    st_drop_geometry() |>
    mutate(
        group = case_when(
            london == 1 & treated == 0 ~ "Inner London (Control)",
            london == 1 & treated == 1 ~ "Outer London (Treated)",
            london == 0                ~ "Surrounding Districts"
        )
    ) |>
    group_by(yq, group) |>
    summarise(
        mean_bev_share     = mean(bev_share,     na.rm = TRUE),
        mean_phev_share    = mean(phev_share,    na.rm = TRUE),
        mean_company_share = mean(company_share, na.rm = TRUE),
        mean_private_share = mean(private_share, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
    )

# BEV vs PHEV
p1 <- disagg_data |>
    pivot_longer(cols = c(mean_bev_share, mean_phev_share),
                 names_to = "fuel_type",
                 values_to = "share") |>
    mutate(fuel_type = recode(fuel_type,
                              "mean_bev_share"  = "BEV",
                              "mean_phev_share" = "PHEV")) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = yq, y = share, colour = group, linetype = fuel_type)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = as.numeric(as.yearqtr("2022 Q4")),
               linetype = "dashed", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = as.numeric(as.yearqtr("2023 Q3")),
               linetype = "dashed", colour = "red", linewidth = 0.5) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c(
        "Inner London (Control)" = "steelblue",
        "Outer London (Treated)" = "firebrick",
        "Surrounding Districts"  = "darkgreen"
    )) +
    labs(
        title    = "BEV vs PHEV Share by Group",
        x        = "Quarter",
        y        = "Share of total cars",
        colour   = NULL,
        linetype = "Fuel type"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# Company vs Private
p2 <- disagg_data |>
    pivot_longer(cols = c(mean_company_share, mean_private_share),
                 names_to = "keepership",
                 values_to = "share") |>
    mutate(keepership = recode(keepership,
                               "mean_company_share" = "Company",
                               "mean_private_share" = "Private")) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = yq, y = share, colour = group, linetype = keepership)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = as.numeric(as.yearqtr("2022 Q4")),
               linetype = "dashed", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = as.numeric(as.yearqtr("2023 Q3")),
               linetype = "dashed", colour = "red", linewidth = 0.5) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c(
        "Inner London (Control)" = "steelblue",
        "Outer London (Treated)" = "firebrick",
        "Surrounding Districts"  = "darkgreen"
    )) +
    labs(
        title    = "Company vs Private ULEV Share by Group",
        x        = "Quarter",
        y        = "Share of keepership-specific cars",
        colour   = NULL,
        linetype = "Keepership"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")

library(patchwork)
p1 / p2
```
